query: SELECT e.id FROM kb_edges e JOIN kb_properties p ON p.owner_table = 'kb_resources' AND p.owner_id = e.target_id AND p.property_key = 'doc_type' AND NOT p.is_folded WHERE e.source_table = 'kb_resources' AND e.source_id = $1 AND e.target_table = 'kb_resources' AND e.edge_kind = 'leads_to' AND e.label = $2 AND p.property_value #>> '{}' = 'goal' AND NOT e.is_folded
